b_findings.finding: No requirement asserts an acceptance criterion against authored research.md artifacts; tests pin template fidelity, not produced-output compliance, so the test suite cannot detect the drift class that motivated the spec.
b_findings.evidence_quote: Acceptance: each of the five labels appears in `skills/discovery/references/research.md` within the Decision Surface section body, verified by per-label grep in the test suite.
b_findings.straddle_rationale: Adjacent to A: spec described change is internally consistent; what is missing is a feedback loop that would detect drift in produced artifacts.
